languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

languages.text: "Фиксирую нарушение. Техноединица Нунциус игнорирует запрос взаимодействия. Рекомендую проведение ремонтных работ силами данной единицы".
"Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

languages.text: 「違反を登録します。テクニカルユニットのヌンシウスが交戦を要求を無視しています。ユニットの労働力を修理作業に割り当てることを推奨します」
languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

languages.text: "Registriere eine Verletzung. Die Tech-Einheit Nuncius ignoriert eine Einsatzanfrage. Empfehle die Zuweisung der Einheit zu Reparaturaufgaben."
languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

traits.locale_text: "Registriere eine Verletzung. Die Tech-Einheit Nuncius ignoriert eine Einsatzanfrage. Empfehle die Zuweisung der Einheit zu Reparaturaufgaben."

languages.text: «Se ha registrado una infracción. La tecnounidad Nuncius está ignorando una solicitud de interacción. Recomiendo asignar la unidad a labores de reparación».
languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

traits.locale_text: «Se ha registrado una infracción. La tecnounidad Nuncius está ignorando una solicitud de interacción. Recomiendo asignar la unidad a labores de reparación».

languages.text: "İhlal kaydediliyor. Nuncius tekno birimi, etkileşim talebini görmezden gelmekte. Birimin emeğinin onarım görevlerine tahsis edilmesi öneriliyor."
languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

languages.text: « Enregistrement d'une infraction. La techno-unité Nuncius ignore une demande d'interaction. Recommandation : relégation de l'unité à de simples tâches utilitaires. »
languages.original_text: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."

traits.locale_text: « Enregistrement d'une infraction. La techno-unité Nuncius ignore une demande d'interaction. Recommandation : relégation de l'unité à de simples tâches utilitaires. »

languages.text: “记录违规行为。技术单位努恩修斯无视交互请求。建议将该单位分配至维修任务。”
